summary: Created tsconfig.json with ES2022 target, NodeNext module/moduleResolution, strict mode, dist/ outDir, and **/* include. Created src/index.ts with export {} as empty project marker.
Created jest.config.js with @swc/jest transform scoped to tests/unit/**/*.test.ts. Added test:unit script to package.json. Created passing sanity test at tests/unit/setup.test.ts.

Created playwright.config.ts with headless Chromium, baseURL http://localhost:3000, testDir ./tests/e2e. Created sanity test at tests/e2e/setup.spec.ts navigating to about:blank and asserting empty title. Added test:e2e script and updated test script to run test:unit && test:e2e sequentially.

task: Wire up a root test script
summary: No changes required. The package.json 'test' script was already set to 'npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e' from the previous Playwright configuration cycle.
Set module/esnext, moduleResolution/bundler, jsx/preserve, noEmit/true, lib/dom,plugins/next, paths/@/*, include/next-env.d.ts+.next/types, exclude/node_modules+.next+dist+out.
Appended next-env.d.ts to .gitignore. .next/ and out/ were already present.
Deleted src/index.ts. Verified no imports reference it.
Created next.config.mjs with output:export, basePath:/ralph-node-resume, assetPrefix:/ralph-node-resume, images.unoptimized:true, trailingSlash:true, reactStrictMode:true.
Created postcss.config.mjs exporting plugins object with @tailwindcss/postcss.
Binary copied profile.png to public/, created empty .nojekyll for GitHub Pages.
Exported BASE_PATH='/ralph-node-resume' and withBasePath(path) helper.
Added top-level exports for profile, skills, experience, education to complement the resume export.
Created globals.css with Tailwind v4 @import, @theme tokens, base resets, and .section-pad utility class.

task: Fix Jest CSS import parsing error
summary: Added CSS mock and moduleNameMapper entry to jest.config.mjs to resolve @import syntax error.
Fixed two lint errors: template literal in basePath.ts and type button in Nav.tsx.
Section component with id, optional title, testId, and children props. Renders section-pad div, optional h2 with text-4xl md:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tight mb-12.
Added CSS module type declaration to resolve TS2882 import error.
Fixed concurrency group to use quoted string "pages".
Added ^@/src/(.*)$ to moduleNameMapper to fix path resolution for @/src/components/Hero import.
Profile component with motion.p, whileInView animation, resume.profile.summary content.
Skills component rendering four category groups with motion animations and pill-styled chips.
Experience component with timeline rendering resume.experience entries with motion.li animations, bullets with strong labels, and tech stack chips.
Education component with motion animation, md:grid-cols-3 layout, title h3, detail p, optional status span.
